scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:home" "npm run start:dash" "node server.js"
scripts.start:dash: npm run --prefix "Quantix ui and ux/Quantix ui and ux" dev -- --port 3002 --base=/dashboard/ --host
scripts.build:dash: npm run --prefix "Quantix ui and ux/Quantix ui and ux" build -- --base=/dashboard/
scripts.build: npm run build:home && npm run build:dash
